scenes.name: Title
scenes.text: <emphasis>MagicSchool</emphasis>.ai. [pause] Built for teachers — over eighty specialised AI tools, one for each task.

scenes.name: Different approach
scenes.text: ChatGPT is a blank kitchen. MagicSchool is a <emphasis>recipe app</emphasis>. [pause] Pick the tool, fill the form — it structures the prompt for you.

scenes.name: Sign up
scenes.text: Free at <emphasis>magicschool.ai</emphasis>. [pause] Email or single sign-on. The free tier unlocks all eighty-plus tools with a monthly generation limit.

scenes.name: Tool dashboard
scenes.text: Inside, tools are grouped by category.

scenes.name: Workflow
scenes.text: Five steps from form to finished material.

scenes.name: Raina
scenes.text: <emphasis>Raina</emphasis> is the built-in chat assistant. [pause] Instead of regenerating, ask her for the one change you want. Adjust differentiation. Reshape an exit ticket. Done.

scenes.name: Privacy
scenes.text: MagicSchool is FERPA, COPPA, and <emphasis>GDPR</emphasis> compliant. [pause] Strong protections — but the same rule still holds. No real student names. No identifying details.

scenes.name: Best uses
scenes.text: Where it earns its hour back.
